reviews.comment:
Un cafecito mientras atienden el auto... En el kiosko de la estación. Excelente atención y buena charla..

(Translated by Google)
A coffee while they serve your car... At the station kiosk. Excellent service and good conversation.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNclBPNzd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio la atiende un mal educado, que hace lo que quiere y maltrata los clientes (según él Sr "está cansado de atender bolud@s"), me amenazó a mí y mí Sra (están los videos), hicimos la queja correspondiente sin respuesta de YPF/ACA, una pena que un personaje arruine la imagen de la empresa, no volveremos más.

(Translated by Google)
The service station is run by a rude man who does whatever he wants and mistreats customers (according to him, "he's tired of serving idiots"), he threatened me and my wife (the videos are there), we filed the corresponding complaint without a response from YPF/ACA, it's a shame that such a character ruins the image of the company, we will not return.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNLThHQlNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Este acá Santa Rosa está en pleno ingreso a Santa Rosa la pampa donde ofrecen variedad de combustibles está enfrente del hotel y casino en ruta 5 y 35 de Santa Rosa la pampa muy buena atención

(Translated by Google)
This Santa Rosa is right at the entrance to Santa Rosa la Pampa where they offer a variety of fuels. It is in front of the hotel and casino on Route 5 and 35 in Santa Rosa la Pampa. Very good service.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención de los playeros y en el moteles del ACA no dejes de pedir la milanesa de ternero o pollo a caballo y con fritas, que son únicas no como otra igual

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach attendants was excellent, and at the ACA motel, be sure to order the breaded veal cutlet or chicken with fried eggs and fries; they're unique, unlike anything else.
